Committee: Veterans, Homeland Security And Military Affairs

Milestones.Committee: Veterans, Homeland Security And Military Affairs

Actions.Text: REFERRED TO VETERANS, HOMELAND SECURITY AND MILITARY AFFAIRS
AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO VETERANS, HOMELAND SECURITY AND MILITARY AFFAIRS

Title: Exempts certain disabled veterans from real property taxation
Summary: Exempts disabled veterans rated as such by the US Department of Veterans affairs from real property taxation for their primary residence.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the real property tax law, in relation to exempting certain disabled veterans from real property taxation
